news-global-econ.title: Vivek Ramaswamy Wins Ohio Gubernatorial Republican Primary
news-global-econ.description:
Businessman Vivek Ramaswamy soared to victory over his opponent, Casey Putsch, in Ohio's Republican gubernatorial primary race on Tuesday evening.

news-global-soc.title: Zelenskyy blasts ‘absolute cynicism’ as deadly Russian barrage hits Ukraine before planned ceasefire
news-global-soc.description: Russian drone and missile strikes killed at least 22 people and wounded more than 80 across Ukraine, as President Volodymyr Zelenskyy blasted Moscow’s “absolute cynicism."
